titleStmt.title: SII 38.98: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 98. (A.R. No. 98 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravattigaḷ Rājādhirāja II Year 3: 1169 A.D.

summary.p: It records a gift of ninety sheep by Vaḷḷai-kiḻāṉ Mādhavaṉ Paḍampakka nāyakaṉ alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-Mūvēndavēḷār, a native of Kaḍaṟpākkam, a dēvadāna village of the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-koṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachoḷamaṇḍalam, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god. The shepherds of Tribhuvanasundara-tteru received the sheep and agreed to measure out oil for the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrī rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉ
ṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalat
tup puḻaṟkoṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiū
ruṭaiyāṟku Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉaṅkaṭaṟpā
kkattu vaḷḷaikiḻāṉ mātavaṉ paṭampakkaṉāyaka
ṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalamuventaveḷār Iṉ
ṉāyaṉāṟku vaitta tiruṉantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa
Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟil Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruviḷakku
tiripuvaṉacuntaratteruvil maṉṟāṭikaḷil vāṉan Iṭa
ṅkaṉen kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu ṉāṟpattaiñcum Eṉ Ini
maiyetaruvāneṉ kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu ṉāṟpattaiñcu
kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai celuttak kaṭavomaā
nom Ivviruvom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 38.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
